step1.ptxt: HANDLING PRECAUTIONS FOR SRS AIRBAG SYSTEM

step2.ptxt: The vehicle is equipped with an SRS (Supplemental Restraint System) such as airbags. Failure to carry out service operations in the correct sequence could cause the SRS to unexpectedly deploy during servicing. This may cause a serious accident. Before servicing (including inspection, replacement, removal and installation of parts), be sure to read the precautionary notices for the Supplemental Restraint System (See page ).

step1.ptxt: PRECAUTIONS FOR REMOVAL, INSTALLATION AND REPLACEMENT OF POWER STEERING COMPONENTS

step2.ptxt: Be sure to turn the front wheels straight ahead when removing and installing the power steering link assembly.
If disconnecting the steering sliding yoke and the pinion shaft of the power steering link assembly, be sure to put matchmarks before starting the operation.
